name: Short Order Buttermilk Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Add buttermilk to the beaten eggs.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
4. Blend in the sifted ingredients with the egg mixture.
5. Stir in the melted butter.
6. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto a lightly greased griddle.
7. Cook until brown on both sides and cooked through. (Use medium-high heat).
- To make buttermilk: Add 1 tablespoon lemon juice to each cup of milk.
Note: One serving equals three 4-inch pancakes. Approximately six servings per recipe.
